response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on web technologies, open-source contributions, and tooling. While he has relevant C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments, Sound Position Server), his recent roles prioritize TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure, diverging from the role's core C++/STL and industrial automation requirements. His security and cloud expertise is limited compared to the role's emphasis on IEC 62443 and Azure.
strengths: Diverse technical background with exposure to C++ (National Instruments, embedded systems) and low-latency systems (Sociomantic).
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship (workshops, talks, GISCollective platform).
Proven leadership in full-stack development and tooling (re:cinq, MCP code generators).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience; primary focus has shifted to TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure.
No explicit mention of industrial automation, IoT protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 security standards.
Cloud experience appears minimal (no Azure or industrial cloud platforms referenced).
